steps.description: Click the language selector button (flag icon) in the top-right corner of the VS Code welcome sign-in dialog to change the interface language.
Open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code by pressing **Ctrl+Shift+P** from the main workspace interface.
Type 'documentation' into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette input at the top of the interface.
Click the "Help: Documentation" option in the command palette dropdown of Visual Studio Code, immediately below the search bar after typing ">documentation".
@assertion "Teams apps are custom solutions designed to enhance collaboration and productivity within Microsoft Teams." exists
Click the "Why build apps for Microsoft Teams?" hyperlink in the "Apps in Teams" article on the Microsoft Teams documentation page.
@assertion "Teams app capabilities enable collaborative workspaces" exists
Use keyboard shortcut: alt+left to navigate back to the previous page in the Google Chrome browser displaying the Microsoft Teams documentation site.
Open the browser’s in-page search bar using Ctrl+F on the Microsoft Learn "Apps in Teams" article page in Google Chrome.

parameters.text: Build apps for Teams platform and cross-hub agent scenarios

steps.description: Type the text "Build apps for Teams platform and cross-hub agent scenarios" into the search input field located on the Microsoft Learn documentation page for "Apps in Teams" within the Microsoft Teams section.
@assertion the image displays normally.
Press **Ctrl+F** to activate the in-page search bar in the Chrome browser while viewing the “Apps in Teams” documentation page on the Microsoft Learn website.

parameters.text: get started with building agents in teams

steps.description: Type the text "get started with building agents in teams" into the search box labeled "Find by title" in the left navigation panel of the Microsoft Teams developer documentation page.
Click the "Get started with building agents in Teams" blue button on the Microsoft Teams documentation webpage, highlighted by a red crosshair at (453, 627).
@assertion "With the introduction of Teams SDK, developers can create collaborative agents for Teams users." exists
Click the browser back button in the top-left corner of the Google Chrome window, within the "Agents in Teams - Overview" page on the Microsoft Learn site.
Press **Ctrl+F** to activate the in-page search bar in the Chrome browser while viewing the Microsoft Teams Platform documentation page on learn.microsoft.com.

parameters.text: Build a Teams message extension app

steps.description: Type the text "Build a Teams message extension app" into the "Find by title" search box on the left sidebar of the Microsoft Teams documentation page within a Google Chrome browser window.
Click the "Build a Teams message extension app" hyperlink in the Microsoft Teams Platform documentation page, highlighted in orange under the "Build your first Teams app" section.
@assertion "Build a message extension app" exists
